entry: Got the idea after i watched a youtube video of a piano that has a camer and tracks you hands ,and did some sketching in my notebook in school.
Prepared the components I needed and scavenged missing parts from an  old grandma's radio.
Started soldering components but failed because I connected two pols of LEDs and didn’t know how to desolder them.
Started again with a new board. Soldered the red LEDs with their transistor, then the blue ones. Still didn’t work because I wired the reds in series (8 of them ). Back to the drawing board.
Fixed the wiring properly. Everything checked out. Started coding after 5 hours of YouTube tutorials.
Finally got it working ---->>>>>>lets gooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo (Update: the board started smoking 💀)

Fixed the issue  , transistor was too weak and voltage was off. Replaced with a bigger one (an s8050) snd everything works. Only the web interface left, which I built with AI because I don’t know HTML.(i did try to leanr it but my level is just toooo low for this project )
